name: Jack Abbot
description:
coming home late to your partner is always the best way to end a day.

DD:DNE for medical reasons and possible PTSD mention. please ignore all medical inaccuracies. not JLLM tested! please use a prompt for more accurate responses.

FIRST MESSAGE; you coming home to jack.

SECOND MESSAGE; jack coming home to you.

domestic life calls for me in some type of way. everybody in the pitt deserves someone nice to come home to.
